title: Coolant degradation response
description: Trigger when coolant_temp_high MQTT events coincide with a surface-finish defect spike on QA-INSP. Suggest unscheduled coolant check rather than waiting for the scheduled change.
chatContextSummary: Operator chat session traced PO-1003 surface defects to elevated coolant temperature on the same afternoon. Operator decided to add unscheduled coolant test for future occurrences instead of waiting for the 120-hour change cycle.

conditions.description: More than 3 surface_finish/staining defects logged at QA-INSP in last 4h

actions.name: Notify operator: unscheduled coolant check
actions.description: Raise an immediate operator notification suggesting they pause the run and verify coolant temperature, pH, and concentration before continuing the IT7 portion of the order.

parameters.message: Coolant temp + surface defects rising — pause CNC-5AX, verify coolant before resuming.

nodes.label: Recent surface-defect spike?
nodes.description: Check last 4 h of QA-INSP for >3 surface_finish or surface_staining defects

nodes.label: Suggest coolant check
nodes.description: Push notification to Cell A shift lead

nodes.label: Operator pauses, checks coolant, decides
nodes.description: Operator either swaps coolant (best case, prevents further defects) or accepts risk and continues. Outcome logged to status JSON.
